steps.title: Identify the curves and what to find
steps.content: The system consists of a parabola (the upward-opening U-shaped quadratic curve) and a line (the linear equation with positive slope). To find the number of solutions to the system, count the points where these two curves intersect.

steps.title: Count the intersection points
steps.content: Looking at the graph from left to right, the line intersects the left side of the parabola around x ≈ −8, continues upward through the interior, and intersects the right side of the parabola around x ≈ 6. The line and parabola meet at exactly 2 distinct points. That matches choice C — C is correct.
